input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.9.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.9.1
            TITLE: the vehicle must include a tractive systems active light (tsal) that must:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.9.1: The vehicle must include a Tractive Systems Active Light (TSAL) that must:
EV.5.9.1 The vehicle must include a Tractive Systems Active Light (TSAL) that must: 
a. Illuminate when the GLV System is energized to indicate the status of the Tractive 
System 
b. Be directly controlled by the voltage present in the Tractive System using hard wired 
electronics.  Software control is not permitted. 
c. Not perform any other functions.

final_answer:
The vehicle must include a Tractive Systems Active Light (TSAL) that must:

a. Illuminate when the GLV System is energized to indicate the status of the Tractive System
b. Be directly controlled by the voltage present in the Tractive System using hard wired electronics. Software control is not permitted.
c. Not perform any other functions.
